R Notebook

# pre-cleaned and standardized team names in Excel before creating csv

NCAA_finals <- read.csv("~/Desktop/Basketball Analysis/acc-basketball/NCAA_Finals.csv")
# checking to see the data type of Date

str(NCAA_finals)
'data.frame':   588 obs. of  36 variables:
 $ Team         : chr  "Florida" "Houston" "Florida" "Auburn" ...
 $ Seed         : int  1 1 1 1 1 1 1 1 1 4 ...
 $ Date         : chr  "2025-04-07 NCAA" "2025-04-07 NCAA" "2025-04-05 NCAA" "2025-04-05 NCAA" ...
 $ PTS          : int  65 63 79 73 70 67 75 60 86 72 ...
 $ Opp          : chr  "Houston" "Florida" "Auburn" "Florida" ...
 $ Opp_Seed     : int  1 1 1 1 1 1 1 1 4 1 ...
 $ Result       : chr  "W 65-63" "L 63-65" "W 79-73" "L 73-79" ...
 $ Round        : chr  "National Final" "National Final" "National Semi" "National Semi" ...
 $ Region       : chr  "West" "Midwest" "West" "South" ...
 $ MP_team      : int  200 200 200 200 200 200 200 200 200 200 ...
 $ FG_team      : int  21 24 25 25 23 21 30 24 31 26 ...
 $ FGA_team     : int  53 69 53 57 61 53 62 54 62 58 ...
 $ FG._team     : num  0.396 0.348 0.472 0.439 0.377 0.396 0.484 0.444 0.5 0.448 ...
 $ x2P_team     : int  15 18 17 18 13 14 24 23 21 15 ...
 $ x2PA_team    : int  29 44 32 32 39 36 40 47 37 35 ...
 $ x2P_perc_team: num  0.517 0.409 0.531 0.563 0.333 0.389 0.6 0.489 0.568 0.429 ...
 $ x3P_team     : int  6 6 8 7 10 7 6 1 10 11 ...
 $ x3PA_team    : int  24 25 21 25 22 17 22 7 25 23 ...
 $ x3P_perc_team: num  0.25 0.24 0.381 0.28 0.455 0.412 0.273 0.143 0.4 0.478 ...
 $ FT_team      : int  17 9 21 16 14 18 9 11 14 9 ...
 $ FTA_team     : int  21 14 30 23 18 23 11 15 18 11 ...
 $ FT_perc_team : num  0.81 0.643 0.7 0.696 0.778 0.783 0.818 0.733 0.778 0.818 ...
 $ PTS_team     : int  65 63 79 73 70 67 75 60 86 72 ...
 $ FG_opp       : int  24 21 25 25 21 23 24 30 26 31 ...
 $ FGA_opp      : int  69 53 57 53 53 61 54 62 58 62 ...
 $ FG_perc_opp  : num  0.348 0.396 0.439 0.472 0.396 0.377 0.444 0.484 0.448 0.5 ...
 $ x2P_opp      : int  18 15 18 17 14 13 23 24 15 21 ...
 $ x2PA_opp     : int  44 29 32 32 36 39 47 40 35 37 ...
 $ x2P_per_opp  : num  0.409 0.517 0.563 0.531 0.389 0.333 0.489 0.6 0.429 0.568 ...
 $ x3P_opp      : int  6 6 7 8 7 10 1 6 11 10 ...
 $ x3PA_opp     : int  25 24 25 21 17 22 7 22 23 25 ...
 $ x3P_perc_opp : num  0.24 0.25 0.28 0.381 0.412 0.455 0.143 0.273 0.478 0.4 ...
 $ FT_opp       : int  9 17 16 21 18 14 11 9 9 14 ...
 $ FTA_opp      : int  14 21 23 30 23 18 15 11 11 18 ...
 $ FT_perc_opp  : num  0.643 0.81 0.696 0.7 0.783 0.778 0.733 0.818 0.818 0.778 ...
 $ PTS_opp      : int  63 65 73 79 67 70 60 75 72 86 ...
# cleaning Date to be able to separate the year
# convert to numeric

NCAA_finals <- NCAA_finals |>
  separate(
    col = Date,
    into = c("Year", "Day", "Month"),
    sep = "-",
    convert = TRUE
  )
# drop day and month of game

NCAA_finals <- NCAA_finals |>
  select(-Day, -Month)
# creating separate data frames for National Championship, Final Four, and Elite Eight rounds

NCAA_final_four <- NCAA_finals |>
  filter(Round == "National Semi") |>
  arrange(desc(Year))

NCAA_champs <- NCAA_finals |>
  filter(Round == "National Final") |>
  arrange(desc(Year))

NCAA_final_four <- NCAA_final_four |>
  # create a game key that looks at the team and opponent and puts the in alphabetical order
  mutate(game_key = map2_chr(Team, Opp, ~paste(sort(c(.x, .y)), collapse = '_'))) |>
  # each game key and year should be unique to one game
  group_by(game_key, Year) |>
  # take the first one to remove duplicates (UNC vs Duke 2022 is the same as Duke vs UNC 2022)
  slice(1) |>
  ungroup() |>
  arrange(desc(Year))

NCAA_champs <- NCAA_champs |>
  mutate(game_key = map2_chr(Team, Opp, ~paste(sort(c(.x, .y)), collapse = '_'))) |>
  group_by(game_key, Year) |>
  slice(1) |>
  ungroup() |>
  arrange(desc(Year))

NCAA_ff_score_diff <- NCAA_final_four |>
  mutate(score_diff = abs(PTS_team - PTS_opp),
         seed_diff = abs(Seed - Opp_Seed),
         seed_diff_cat = case_when(
          is.na(seed_diff) ~ NA_character_,
          seed_diff == 0 ~ "Even",
          seed_diff <= 2 ~ "Small",
          seed_diff <= 4 ~ "Medium",
          TRUE ~ "Large"
          )
        )

NCAA_champs_score_diff <- NCAA_champs |>
  mutate(score_diff = abs(PTS_team - PTS_opp),
         seed_diff = abs(Seed - Opp_Seed),
         seed_diff_cat = case_when(
          is.na(seed_diff) ~ NA_character_,
          seed_diff == 0 ~ "Even",
          seed_diff <= 2 ~ "Small",
          seed_diff <= 4 ~ "Medium",
          TRUE ~ "Large"
          )
        )

mean_ff_score_diff <- mean(NCAA_ff_score_diff$score_diff)
mean_champs_score_diff <- mean(NCAA_champs_score_diff$score_diff)
NCAA_ff_score_diff <- NCAA_ff_score_diff |>
  mutate(
    one_v_one = (Seed == 1 & Opp_Seed == 1)
  )

NCAA_champs_score_diff <- NCAA_champs_score_diff |>
  mutate(
    one_v_one = (Seed == 1 & Opp_Seed == 1)
  )

NCAA_ff_score_diff |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = score_diff, color = seed_diff_cat)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Even" = "black",
    "Small" = "blue",
    "Medium" = "orange",
    "Large" = "red"
  )) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean_ff_score_diff, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(min(NCAA_ff_score_diff$Year), max(NCAA_ff_score_diff$Year), by = 5)) +
  labs(
    x = "Tournament Year",
    y = "Score Differential",
    title = "Final Four: Score Differentials",
    caption = "Data: Stathead",
    color = "Seed Differential"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45))


NCAA_champs_score_diff |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = score_diff, color = seed_diff_cat)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Even" = "black",
    "Small" = "blue",
    "Medium" = "orange",
    "Large" = "red"
  )) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean_champs_score_diff, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(min(NCAA_champs_score_diff$Year), max(NCAA_champs_score_diff$Year), by = 5)) +
  labs(
    x = "Tournament Year",
    y = "Score Differential",
    title = "Championship: Score Differentials",
    caption = "Data: Stathead",
    color = "Seed Differential"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45))
